title: Phase 2 — Model zoo, training, and comparative evaluation
step_1_summary: Canonical list of evaluation tasks. Every benchmark row should set task_id (or inherit the default retrieval task). Metrics and gold fields are task-specific.

tasks.name: Law-grounded passage retrieval
tasks.description: Given a natural-language tax question, retrieve passages from corpus_v1. Ground truth is one or more chunk_ids that a subject-matter expert ties to the operative rule or definition.

primary_metrics.definition: Fraction of examples where at least one gold_chunk_id appears in the model top-k retrieved chunk_ids.
Mean reciprocal rank of the first relevant chunk (planned in eval harness).

tasks.name: Tax intent classification
tasks.description: Map the user utterance to a closed or open tag set of tax intents (e.g. personal_relief, residence_scope). Used to compare NLU encoders and small classifiers before or alongside retrieval.

primary_metrics.definition: Exact match on normalized intent label.

tasks.name: Joint intent + law-grounded retrieval
tasks.description: Pipeline task: correct intent and at least one gold chunk in top-k. Models the full routing + evidence path for advisory UX.

primary_metrics.definition: Fraction of examples where intent matches gold AND recall_at_k_any_gold holds (planned intent model).

tasks.name: Generated answer with citation grounding
tasks.description: Full natural-language answer must cite corpus chunks; overlap between cited chunk_ids and gold_chunk_ids (and optional rubric). For later SLM / RAG evaluation.

primary_metrics.definition: Fraction of required gold chunks cited or paraphrase-justified (rubric TBD).
